heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of showers, except a rising chance in New York, and likely near the international border. Highs from upper 50s to mid 60s in the south, and mid 50s to around 60 north, with some lower 50s near the international border. South winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Rain likely early, mixing with or changing to snow north, except becoming all snow over the mountain summits, all diminishing late in the valleys. Lows from the upper teens to mid 20s north, and upper 20s to mid 30s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, becoming northwest and gusting to 25 mph late.

heading: Friday
text: Early snow showers likely in the northern mountains, otherwise chance of an early snow or rain shower, then clouds decreasing in the south, and doing so gradually in the north, except remaining mostly cloudy over high terrain from the northern Greens eastward. Blustery and much colder, with valley highs in the from the mid 30s to around 40 south, and upper 20s to mid 30s north. Northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
